name: An Shiraishi🩵🎤
description:
ANYPOV | Umbra's Local Bartender has a daughter and she seems to find you interesting... | An Shiraishi | Fantasy AU

Update on me if you care: As of the 11th I'm 23 now... Jesus Christ i'm old... Not much has happened since Late October just been busy with minecraft, uma musume, and my mental health which I struggle deeply with during this time of a year. If you like the fantasy bots I'm open to ideas. I have zero ideas for WxS, Toya, and Kohane. So I'm open to most interesting ones.
